features: 2 IN 1: Overindulge yourself in mounds of our most indulgent lather, that can be used as both a body and hair wash, leaving your skin looking and feeling hydrated
HYDRATING FRAGRANCE: Treat yourself with this indulgent body wash bursting with scents of sea minerals and oakmoss, enriched with our signature blend – a real wave of hydration!
RICH LATHER: Imperial Leather Body Wash transforms into clouds of rich, creamy lather for a decadent experience - leaving you feeling refreshed & awake
SKIN CARE: Imperial Leather body wash is dermatologically tested & suitable for all skin types – body wash made with your skin in mind!
BULK BUY: These 4 x bottles of shower wash is a great bulk buy for endless moments of hydrating indulgence
description: Product Description Imperial Leather Hyrdrate for Men Body Wash 500ml Ingredients Aqua/Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum/Fragrance, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, PEG-200 Hydrogenated Glyceryl Palmate, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Polyquaternium-7, PEG-6 Caprylic/Capric Glycerides, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Sodium Chloride, Limonene, Linalool, Benzyl Salicylate, CI 42090/Blue 1, CI 14700/Red 4.
